raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Index builder fails due to incomplete AST parsing and skipped files; archived despite active dependency", "recommended_fix": "Move code_index.py out of archive/ and fix path filtering to include indexed paths; add vola-builder.config.json to define module/endpoint rules"}, {"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "memory/swarm/code-index.json", "issue": "Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, creating false confidence in tooling", "recommended_fix": "Rebuild index after fixing code_index.py and validate output integrity"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Index corruption compromises all agent file lookups, risking systemic failure", "next_files_to_read": ["vola-builder.config.json"]}

findings.issue: Index builder fails due to incomplete AST parsing and skipped files; archived despite active dependency
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/ and fix path filtering to include indexed paths; add vola-builder.config.json to define module/endpoint rules

findings.issue: Index is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent timestamp, creating false confidence in tooling
